course_title: Modern Italian History: Risorgimento to Today
description:
Offered: every other year
Surveys the political and social development of modern Italy from the origins of the Risorgimento in the 1840s through the end of political unification in 1870, immigration and the diaspora of late 19th century, post WWI instability and the rise of Mussolini’s fascist regime, post W.W.II economic resurgence, and concludes with a survey of contemporary political and social issues.
Prerequisite(s): AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, HI
prerequisites: AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
